strings.en: Govern VMware and AtomOS side by side. Migrate workload by workload with no forklift, no downtime windows, and no new dependency cycle.
strings.it: Gestisci VMware e AtomOS fianco a fianco. Migra workload per workload senza forklift, downtime o nuovo ciclo di dipendenza.
strings.fr: Gouvernez VMware et AtomOS côte à côte. Migrez charge par charge sans migration massive, fenêtres d'arrêt ni nouveau cycle de dépendance.

strings.en: Exit VMware Without Entering Another Lock-In | Elemento
strings.it: Uscire da VMware senza un nuovo lock-in | Elemento
strings.fr: Quitter VMware sans nouveau verrouillage | Elemento
